page_metadata.biotools__summary: From Metabolite to Metabolite (FMM) is a web server for metabolic pathway reconstruction from one metabolite to another metabolite in a different species based on the KEGG pathway and other integrated databases.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: From Metabolite to Metabolite (FMM) is a web server for metabolic pathway reconstruction from one metabolite to another metabolite in a different species based on the KEGG pathway and other integrated databases.
